text: Living a healthy life involves more than just eating well. A balanced diet with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains gives your body the energy it needs. Regular exercise, such as walking or cycling for 30 minutes a day, strengthens your heart and muscles. Equally important is getting enough sleep—aim for seven to nine hours each night to help your body recover and your mind rest. Don't forget your mental health, either. Taking time to relax, talk to friends, or practice mindfulness can reduce stress. Finally, maintaining a good work-life balance ensures you have time for both responsibilities and activities you enjoy, making your overall health stronger.
